ddls:
CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sending the message */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the message */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the message */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the message */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the message (e.g., accepted, pending, rejected) */,
  "is_encrypted" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the message content is encrypted */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the message has been read by the recipient */,
  "is_important" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the message is marked as important */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the message has been deleted by the sender or recipient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the message the attachment belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the attachment */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the attachment file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the attachment file (e.g., PDF, PNG) */,
  "is_encrypted" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the attachment is encrypted */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attachment was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_message_id FOREIGN KEY ("message_id") REFERENCES messages ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "message_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the message related to the log entry */,
  "status_change" TEXT /* Description of the status change (e.g., 'delivered', 'read') */,
  "initiated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the status change */,
  "is_system_generated" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the log entry was generated by the system */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status change occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_message_logs_message_id FOREIGN KEY ("message_id") REFERENCES messages ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_message_logs_initiated_by FOREIGN KEY ("initiated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related message */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., 'new message', 'message read') */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the notification has been deleted */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_message_id FOREIGN KEY ("message_id") REFERENCES messages ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the setting belongs */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., 'notification sound') */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting (e.g., 'enabled', 'disabled') */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the setting is a default setting */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., 'sent message', 'logged in') */,
  "activity_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "message_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the template */,
  "template_content" TEXT /* Content of the message template */,
  "is_shared" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the template is shared with other users */,
  "is_system_template" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the template is a system-provided template */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the template was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_message_templates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "archived_messages" (
  "archive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each archived message */,
  "message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original message */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for archiving the message (e.g., 'reached retention limit', 'manually archived') */,
  "archived_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who archived the message */,
  "archived_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("archive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_archived_messages_message_id FOREIGN KEY ("message_id") REFERENCES messages ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_archived_messages_archived_by FOREIGN KEY ("archived_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
